data.title: ParaZero Issues CEO Letter to Shareholders: Reports Strong Revenue Growth for Full Year 2025
data.description: In KFAR SABA, Israel, on March 27, 2026, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) released a shareholder letter from their CEO, Ariel Aron. The company focuses on developing intelligent, autonomous products for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS) globally. ParaZero is known for its innovative solutions in the aerospace defense sector.

data.title: BOSS Zhipin Continued Share Repurchase, Total Repurchases Amount to Over RMB500 million in 2026
data.description: On March 26, 2026, KANZHUN LIMITED, also known as "BOSS Zhipin," repurchased 506,252 ordinary shares using approximately RMB23.6 million. So far in 2026, the Company has spent more than RMB500 million on share buybacks. This initiative highlights the Company's dedication to enhancing shareholder value through its repurchase program.

data.title: Hudbay Provides Annual Reserve and Resource Update with Mine Life Extensions and Improved Three-Year Production Outlook
data.description: On March 27, 2026, Hudbay Minerals Inc. unveiled its latest annual mineral reserve and resource update, along with a new three-year production forecast. The company, listed on both TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol HBM, presented the figures in U.S. dollars. This update provides stakeholders with critical information on the company's mineral reserves, resources, and anticipated production levels for the upcoming years.

data.title: SFL - Notice of Annual General Meeting 2026
data.description: SFL Corporation Ltd. (NYSE: SFL) has announced that its 2026 Annual General Meeting is scheduled for May 11, 2026. The record date for voting is April 1, 2026. All relevant details, including the Notice of Annual General Meeting and the Company's Annual Report on Form 20-F, will be posted on the company's website, www.sflcorp.com, before the meeting.

data.title: Vertical Aerospace Selects Isoclima as Strategic Transparency Partner for Valo
data.description: A leading aerospace and technology company, Vertical Aerospace, trading as [NYSE: EVTL], based in London and New York, has chosen Isoclima S.p.A., a renowned provider of high-performance transparent solutions, to be a key supplier for their Valo aircraft. Isoclima will be responsible for creating and producing the entire transparency suite for Valo, which encompasses the canopies for both pilots and passengers, along with the glazing systems. This partnership is part of a long-term agreement between the two companies to enhance the Valo aircraft's design and functionality.

data.title: Askey and Canoga Perkins Announce Strategic Collaboration at MWC Barcelona to Deliver Rapid-Deploy 5G Critical Communications Solutions
data.description: At the Mobile World Congress in Barcelona, a significant global partnership was revealed between Askey and Canoga Perkins. The collaboration aims to provide the SyncMetra® Network Connectivity Solution, a combination of Canoga Perkins’ software-defined private 5G network transport and Askey’s carrier-grade 5G radio access technology. The announcement was made at the MWC Barcelona in 2026, marking the strategic partnership between Askey Computer Corporation and Canoga Perkins to implement the SyncMetra® Platform in various enterprise and service settings. This partnership highlights a focus on advanced networking solutions that cater to the demands of modern connectivity requirements.

data.title: Forgent Power Solutions Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Class A Common Stock
data.description: Forgent Power Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: FPS), a prominent manufacturer of electrical distribution equipment for data centers, power grids, and industrial sites, disclosed the pricing for its public offering of Class A common stock. The offering involves 20,688,874 shares at $29.50 per share, offered by the Company's parent entities. This move underscores Forgent's strategic growth plans and financial activities in the market.

data.title: Qumulo Selects Ireland for European Software Research and Development Hub
data.description: In Cork, Ireland, Qumulo has officially launched its new European Software R&D and Customer Service hub headquarters. This move marks a significant step for the company as it expands its operations in the region. The hub will serve as a center for research and development, as well as providing customer service support. This development demonstrates Qumulo's commitment to growth and innovation in Europe.

data.title: Kontrol Technologies Increases Its Solutions for the Multi-Residential Building Sector and Enters into Non-Binding Letter of Intent to Acquire HVAC Service Business
data.description: In Toronto, Kontrol Technologies Corp. (KNR) is broadening its offerings in the Multi-Residential Building industry. The company, listed as CBOE.CA: KNR, OTCQB: KNRLF, FSE: 1K8, has entered a non-binding Letter of Intent to acquire an HVAC service business based in Ontario. This move is part of Kontrol's mergers and acquisitions strategy. Over the last year, Kontrol has prioritized growth in the Multi-Residential Market.

data.title: OTC Markets Group Welcomes Orvana Minerals Corp. to OTCQX
data.description: On March 27, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Orvana Minerals Corp., a gold-copper-silver company with multiple mines, now trades on the OTCQX® Best Market under the symbols TSX: ORV and OTCQX: ORVMF. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates regulated markets facilitating the trading of 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Orvana Minerals Corp. transitioned to OTCQX from the Pink Limited™ Market.

data.title: Neutrogena®, Aveeno® and Rogaine® Release New Dermatology Research and Clinical Skincare Innovations on Healthy Aging, Moisturization, Sun Protection and Acne
data.description: Cutting-edge UV absorption technologies, long-lasting hydration formulas, ingredients that support skin barriers, and top acne treatments were showcased at the recent American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting (AAD 2026) in Summit, New Jersey. The event took place on March 27, 2026. The innovative products and solutions presented at the conference are set to revolutionize the skincare industry.

data.title: US Mortgage Rates Hit Six-Month High As Iran War Stokes Inflation Fears
data.description: This week, the average 30-year fixed-rate mortgage reached a six-month peak at 6.38%, as reported by Freddie Mac in its Primary Mortgage Market Survey. This marked a notable increase from the previous week's 6.22% and signified the highest level since early September. This escalation comes amidst a challenging housing market scenario, exacerbated by elevated oil prices due to the Middle East conflict, sparking renewed inflation worries. Oil prices have surged over 30% since the onset of the Iran conflict in late February, causing a ripple effect on U.S. Treasury yields. Consequently, mortgage rates, which mirror the 10-year Treasury rates, have climbed consecutively for four weeks. The heightened borrowing costs are anticipated to pose obstacles to the spring homebuying season.
